definition.featurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="feature_container" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><value name="feature"><block type="feature_block_column"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="2"></mutation><field name="direction">DOWN</field><field name="prioritize_tip">TRUE</field><comment pinned="false" h="158" w="239">This block represents a single column of cave vines. We prioritize the tip, so that the head of the plant always generates.</comment><value name="allowed_placement"><block type="block_predicate_is_air"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Cave vines can only grow through air</comment></block></value><value name="layer0"><block type="block_column_layer" inline="false"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This layer represents the body of the plant</comment><value name="height"><block type="int_provider_weighted"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="3"></mutation><field name="weight0">2</field><field name="weight1">3</field><field name="weight2">10</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This determines the height of the plant. Most plants will have an height between 0 and 6</comment><value name="entry0"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">0</field><field name="max">19</field></block></value><value name="entry1"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">0</field><field name="max">2</field></block></value><value name="entry2"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">0</field><field name="max">6</field></block></value></block></value><value name="block"><block type="state_provider_weighted"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="2"></mutation><field name="weight0">4</field><field name="weight1">1</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block used for the stem. Most of the blocks don't have berries.</comment><value name="entry0"><block type="blockstate_selector" inline="true"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="1"></mutation><field name="block">Blocks.CAVE_VINES_PLANT</field><field name="property0">berries</field><field name="value0">false</field></block></value><value name="entry1"><block type="blockstate_selector" represents the head of the plant</comment><value name="height"><block type="int_provider_constant"><field name="value">1</field></block></value><value name="block"><block
